//: Drop-in MCP server config for Gemini CLI. Merge the 'cheapskate' entry below into the
//_2: mcpServers object of your settings.json (~/.gemini/settings.json for all projects, or
//_3: .gemini/settings.json in a project). If settings.json has no mcpServers key yet, add it.
//requires: The mcp extra: pip install 'cheapskate[mcp]'  (so 'cheapskate mcp' can start the stdio server).
//fields: command/args/cwd/env/timeout/trust are the documented Gemini CLI stdio fields; env supports $VAR expansion. 'trust: false' keeps tool-call confirmations on (recommended).
